insights.desc:
When entering battle, Anjo Nala chooses another ally to bind with. The type of binding is determined by the Afflatus of the bound character, and provides enhancements to both characters:

Spirit/Intelligence [Mind and Flesh]: 4% of each other's ATK and Max HP.

Beast/Plant [Bone and Blood]: 8% of each other's Critical DMG and Reality DEF.

Mineral/Star [Form and Phantom]: 8% of each other's Critical Rate and Mental DEF.

Anjo Nala’s Max Moxie is changed to 12 while Ultimate Moxie Cost or Consumption is changed to 8.

The bound ally cannot gain or cast ultimates.

All Moxie gained by the bound ally will be transferred to Anjo Nala instead.
Crit DMG +15% when the caster enters battle.

After the bound ally actively casts an incantation, if Anjo Nala is in the [Hymn] status, reduce the duration of the [Hymn] status by 1 round, and trigger additional effects based on the binding's type:

[Mind and Flesh]: Anjo Nala launches a rank 1 [Feast of Lust] as a follow-up attack against the enemy with the lowest HP percentage.

[Bone and Blood]: Anjo Nala gains 1 additional Moxie.

[Form and Phantom]: Anjo Nala casts 1 [Angel’s Temptation], up to 2 times per round.

Precognition

Insight I

When allies cast Ultimate, Igor gains +1 Moxie and inflicts 3/5 stacks of [Shrapnel] on all enemies. If 1/2 [Beast] allies are present, increase the number of [Shrapnel] stacks inflicted on the primary target when casting [Undying Light] by 5/7. When an ally performs a 1-target attack, inflict 1/2 additional stacks of [Shrapnel] on the target.

If Lopera is in the party, her Critical DMG is increased by +50% and she inflicts 6 stacks of [Burn] before attacking. Upon casting Ultimate, she distributes 1 stack of [Ritual Bullet] / [Incantation Bullet] to allies in front and behind her.If Moldir is in the party, her and Igor’s excess Moxie is temporarily stored, refilling at the end of the turn if they have space (up to a max of 5). Upon casting Ultimate, she grants +1 Moxie to herself and +2 to Igor while inflicting 12 stacks of [Shrapnel] on all enemies.
Upon entering combat, increase ATK by +5%.
Upon entering combat, gain +2 Moxie. An additional +1 Moxie is gained for every [Beast] ally present (up to +2).

skills.name: Please, Come On In
skills.desc_1_star: Mass attack. Deals 225% Mental DMG to all enemies, inflicts 1 instance of [Poison] for 2 rounds on the targets hit: at the end of each round, deals (the user's ATK x20%) Genesis DMG to the target, then deals an additional (Tuesday's ATK x number of instances of [Poison] on the target x30%) Genesis DMG that can critically hit to the target; and at the same time, deploys array [Horror Story Night] for 3 rounds.

skills.name: The Horror's Delight
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 130% Mental DMG. Inflicts 2 instances of [Poison] on the target for 2 rounds: at the end of the round, deals (the user's ATK x20%) Genesis DMG to the target; then inflicts 1 instance of the same [Poison] on another random, legal enemy target if able, repeating up to 2 times.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Deals 230% Mental DMG. Inflicts 2 instances of [Poison] on the target for 2 rounds: at the end of the round, deals (the user's ATK x20%) Genesis DMG to the target; then inflicts 1 instance of the same [Poison] on another random, legal enemy target if able, repeating up to 3 times.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Deals 455% Mental DMG. Inflicts 2 instances of [Poison] on the target for 2 rounds: at the end of the round, deals (the user's ATK x20%) Genesis DMG to the target; then inflicts 1 instance of the same [Poison] on another random, legal enemy target if able, repeating up to 4 times.

skills.name: In Mother's Arms
skills.desc_1_star: Mass debuff. Inflicts Genesis DMG Taken +15% on all enemies for 2 rounds; inflicts Critical Resist Rate -15% (-20% to targets in the [Poison] status) on all enemies for 2 rounds.
skills.desc_2_star: Mass debuff. Inflicts Genesis DMG Taken +25% on all enemies for 2 rounds; inflicts Critical Resist Rate -15% (-20% to targets in the [Poison] status) on all enemies for 2 rounds.
skills.desc_3_star: Mass debuff. Inflicts Genesis DMG Taken +35% on all enemies for 2 rounds; inflicts Critical Resist Rate -15% (-20% to targets in the [Poison] status) on all enemies for 2 rounds.

insights.desc: When entering battle, gain [Fear's Cradle]. When entering battle, grant Genesis DMG Dealt +15% to self.
ATK +5% when entering battle.
When entering battle, gain [Room Service]. When entering battle, gain Moxie +2 for self (triggers only 1 time).

skills.name: Song for the Bad Tooth
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 500% Mental DMG. This attack has a +30% Crit Rate. After this attack scores a critical hit, purifies [Stats Down], [Negative Status], and [Control] status from all allies.

skills.name: Empty Gums
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 150% Mental DMG. After attacking, inflicts 1 stack of [Confusion] on the target for 1 round.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Deals 250% Mental DMG. After attacking, inflicts 1 stack of [Confusion] on the target for 1 round.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Deals 450% Mental DMG. After attacking, inflicts 1 stack of [Confusion] on the target for 1 round.

skills.name: Lullaby
skills.desc_1_star: Mass healing. HP +(the caster's ATK x80%) for all allies. This healing effect gains an additional 30% Critical Rate.
skills.desc_2_star: Mass healing. HP +(the caster's ATK x120%) for all allies. This healing effect gains an additional 30% Critical Rate.
skills.desc_3_star: Mass healing. HP +(the caster's ATK x200%) for all allies. This healing effect gains an additional 30% Critical Rate.

insights.desc: When entering battle, instantly gains 3 [Baby Tooth]. When any team member actively uses a character incantation, collects 1 [Baby Tooth]. At the start of the round, consumes 5 [Baby Teeth] to reduce the enemy team's Critical Resist and Critical DEF by 15%. Lasts 1 round. (Cannot trigger if Baby Tooth are insufficient.)
When entering battle, Healing Done +10%.
When triggering the [Baby Tooth] Stats Down effect, all allies recover (Missing HP x10%) HP. When entering battle, gain additional [Baby Tooth] +2.

skills.name: The Sum of Infinity
skills.desc_1_star: Self channel. Enters [Hyper Analysis] status for 1 round. Extends the duration of [Structural Analysis]/[Frequency Analysis] by 1 round. Gains 30 stacks of [Dynamo] and transfers 30 stacks of [Dynamo] into [Pulsing Field].

skills.name: Scanning Mode
skills.desc_1_star: Self channel. Enters [Structure Analysis] for 3 rounds. If already in this status, gains 6 stacks of [Ceremonious: Ultimate Might] and transfers up to 5 stacks of [Dynamo] into [Pulsing Field].
skills.desc_2_star: Self channel. Enters [Structure Analysis] for 3 rounds. If already in this status, gains 8 stacks of [Ceremonious: Ultimate Might] and transfers up to 5 stacks of [Dynamo] into [Pulsing Field].
skills.desc_3_star: Self channel. Enters [Structure Analysis] for 3 rounds. If already in this status, gains 10 stacks of [Ceremonious: Ultimate Might] and transfers up to 5 stacks of [Dynamo] into [Pulsing Field].

skills.name: Brown Noise
skills.desc_1_star: Self channel. Enters [Frequency Analysis] for 3 rounds. If already in this status, gains 6 stacks of [Ceremonious: Ultimate Might] and transfers up to 5 [Dynamo] into [Pulsing Field].
skills.desc_2_star: Self channel. Enters [Frequency Analysis] for 3 rounds. If already in this status, gains 8 stacks of [Ceremonious: Ultimate Might] and transfers up to 5 [Dynamo] into [Pulsing Field].
skills.desc_3_star: Self channel. Enters [Frequency Analysis] for 3 rounds. If already in this status, gains 10 stacks of [Ceremonious: Ultimate Might] and transfers up to 5 [Dynamo] into [Pulsing Field].

insights.desc:
Gains [Amplified Surge].

When entering battle, gains 20 stacks of [Dynamo].

At the start of the round, if not under a [Pulsing Field] of any level, deploy [Pulsing Field Lv.1].

At the end of the round, gains 5 stacks of [Dynamo] and transfers up to 15 stacks of [Dynamo] into the [Pulsing Field].

At the end of the round, casts [Surge Spike] 1 time.

Ultimate does not take up the allied Incantation Draw Limit.
DMG Dealt +8% when entering battle.

At the end of the round, for every stack of [Dynamo] transferred by the team during the round, Ulrich gains 1 stack of [Decryption Key] for his [Structure Analysis], [Frequency Analysis], and [Hyper Analysis] and 5 stacks of [Dynamo].

skills.name: Indomitable Fire, Scorching Heart
skills.desc_1_star: Mass buff. All allies gain DMG Dealt +15% and DMG Taken -15% for 3 rounds. If enemies have 15 or more stacks of [Burn] in total, the DMG Dealt effect is doubled.

skills.name: Opening Ceremony
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 160% Mental DMG. This attack gains Penetration Rate +25% against targets inflicted with [Burn].
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Deals 240% Mental DMG. This attack gains Penetration Rate +30% against targets inflicted with [Burn].
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Deals 400% Mental DMG. This attack gains Penetration Rate +35% against targets inflicted with [Burn].

skills.name: Beating Heart
skills.desc_1_star: Mass attack. Deals 120% Mental DMG to 2 enemies. After attacking, inflicts 1 stack of [Burn] on the targets.
skills.desc_2_star: Mass attack. Deals 180% Mental DMG to 2 enemies. After attacking, inflicts 2 stacks of [Burn] on the targets.
skills.desc_3_star: Mass attack. Deals 300% Mental DMG to 2 enemies. After attacking, inflicts 3 stacks of [Burn] on the targets.

insights.desc: After attacking an enemy that's in the [Burn] status, recover (Missing Hp x8%) HP for all allies. Triggers only 1 time per round.
DMG Taken -8% entering battle.
At the start of the round, inflicts 3 stacks of [Burn] on all enemies.

skills.name: In the Fire, In the Shadow
skills.desc_1_star: Self channel. Enters the [Ancient Ritual] status.

skills.name: Hag’s Advice
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 100% Mental DMG; if the target hit already has an instance of [Poison], convert 1 instance of [Poison] into 1 stack of [Hag's Bane] that lasts 2 rounds; up to 3 instances of Poison can be converted by this effect.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Deals 125% Mental DMG; if the target hit already has an instance of [Poison], convert 1 instance of [Poison] into 1 stack of [Hag's Bane] that lasts 2 rounds; up to 4 instances of Poison can be converted by this effect.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Deals 175% Mental DMG; if the target hit already has an instance of [Poison], convert 1 instance of [Poison] into 1 stack of [Hag's Bane] that lasts 2 rounds; up to 5 instances of Poison can be converted by this effect.

skills.name: Hag’s Gratitude
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 100% Mental DMG; if the target hit already has both an instance of [Poison] and the [Hag's Bane] status, consume up to 2 instance of [Poison], each instance of [Poison] resolves the [Hag's Bane] status on the target once, and the remaining rounds of Hag's Bane do not decrease when resolved this way.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Deals 125% Mental DMG; if the target hit already has both an instance of [Poison] and the [Hag's Bane] status, consume up to 3 instance of [Poison], each instance of [Poison] resolves the [Hag's Bane] status on the target once, and the remaining rounds of Hag's Bane do not decrease when resolved this way.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Deals 175% Mental DMG; if the target hit already has both an instance of [Poison] and the [Hag's Bane] status, consume up to 4 instance of [Poison], each instance of [Poison] resolves the [Hag's Bane] status on the target once, and the remaining rounds of Hag's Bane do not decrease when resolved this way.

insights.desc: At the start of the round, inflicts 2 instances of [Poison] on 2 enemy targets for 2 rounds, prioritizing targets with the most instances of [Poison]. When another ally actively casts and attacks an enemy with an incantation, Willow inflicts 2 additional instances of [Poison] on the main target for 2 rounds, this effect can be trigger up to 2 times per round.
ATK +5% when the caster enters battle.
Enhances [Ancient Ritual]: Grants an additional Max Moxie +5; gains an additional Moxie +1 from casting or moving incantations.

skills.name: Boundless Sea, Limitless Sky
skills.desc_1_star: Mass attack. Can only be cast in the [Boarding Assault] status.  Shifts to the front-most position, deals 200% Reality DMG to all enemies and inflicts [Daze] on the targets for 1 round; for every position shifted, this attack gains DMG Dealt +15%; if at least 3 positions were shifted, this attack ignores 50% Daze Resistance.

skills.name: Port Side Barrage
skills.desc_1_star: Deals 80% Reality DMG to all enemies, then shifts self 1 position backward.
skills.desc_2_star: Deals 120% Reality DMG to all enemies, then shifts self 1 position backward.
skills.desc_3_star: Deals 200% Reality DMG to all enemies, then shifts self 1 position backward.

skills.name: Prepare to Board!
skills.desc_1_star: Self channel. Enters the [Boarding Assault] status. If already in the [Boarding Assault] status, gains an additional Moxie +1.
skills.desc_2_star: Self channel. Enters the [Boarding Assault] status. If already in the [Boarding Assault] status, gains an additional Moxie +1.
skills.desc_3_star: Self channel. Enters the [Boarding Assault] status. If already in the [Boarding Assault] status, gains an additional Moxie +1.

insights.desc: When receiving a shift effect, for every position shifted backward, gain 1 stack of [Rousing Morale], for every position shifted forward, gain 1 stack of [Sturdiness].
DMG Taken -8% when entering battle.

skills.name: Bright Prospect
skills.desc_1_star: Mass buff. Dispels all [Stats Down], [Neg Status] and [Control] status from all allies, then grants the [Rusalka] status to self for 3 rounds, changes the ally's existing [Song of Generosity] to [Song of Passion], and resets its duration. Cannot gain Ultimate while in the [Rusalka] status.

skills.name: Beating Heart
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target buff. Grants [Song of Generosity] to the target for 2 rounds. The [Rusalka] status changes the [Song of Generosity] to [Song of Passion], and only 1 Song of Generosity or Song of Passion can exist on the allied side at a time.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target buff. Grants [Song of Generosity] to the target for 2 rounds and 1 stack of [Power Burst]. The [Rusalka] status changes the [Song of Generosity] to [Song of Passion], and only 1 Song of Generosity or Song of Passion can exist on the allied side at a time.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target buff. Grants [Song of Generosity] to the target for 2 rounds and 2 stacks of [Power Burst]. The [Rusalka] status changes the [Song of Generosity] to [Song of Passion], and only 1 Song of Generosity or Song of Passion can exist on the allied side at a time.

skills.name: Wordless Song
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target heal. Recovers (the user's ATK x100%) HP to an ally and grants 1 stack of [Sturdiness] to the target; and if in the [Rusalka] status, then additionally recovers (the user's ATK x60%) HP to the ally with the lowest HP percentage, twice.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target heal. Recovers (the user's ATK x150%) HP to an ally and grants 1 stack of [Sturdiness] to the target; and if in the [Rusalka] status, then additionally recovers (the user's ATK x100%) HP to the ally with the lowest HP percentage, twice.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target heal. Recovers (the user's ATK x250%) HP to an ally and grants 1 stack of [Sturdiness] to the target; and if in the [Rusalka] status, then additionally recovers (the user's ATK x180%) HP to the ally with the lowest HP percentage, twice.

insights.desc:
When entering battle, gain Moxie +1. For every other Mental DMG ally on the team, gain additional Moxie +1, up to a maximum of Moxie +2.

If in the [Rusalka] status at the start of the round, gain 1 Precast Incantation [Song of Inspiration]: grants Moxie +1 and Eureka +1 to a target ally at no AP cost.
DMG Taken -8% when entering battle.

At the end of the round, if having not actively casted an incantation for the round, recover (own ATK x50%) HP for all allies.

If in the [Rusalka] status at the end of the round, recover (own ATK x60%) HP for all allies.

skills.name: Poem, Island, Breeze
skills.desc_1_star: Mass attack. Deals 250% Mental DMG to all enemies. On hitting the main target, inflicts [Seal] on the main target for 2 rounds.

skills.name: Sparrow
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 200% Mental DMG.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Deals 200% Mental DMG. Inflicts [Silence] status for 1 round on the target hit.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Deals 300% Mental DMG. Inflicts [Silence] status for 2 rounds on the target hit.

skills.name: Paper
skills.desc_1_star: Mass buff. DMG Dealt +15% and DMG Heal +15% for all allies for 2 rounds.
skills.desc_2_star: Mass buff. DMG Dealt +20% and DMG Heal +20% for all allies for 2 rounds.
skills.desc_3_star: Mass buff. DMG Dealt +25% and DMG Heal +25% for all allies for 3 rounds.

insights.desc: When the caster attacks, if the caster's HP is above 50%, Penetration Rate +10%. When the caster is attacked, if the caster's HP is below 50%, DMG Taken -10%.
DMG Dealt +8% when entering battle.

skills.name: Galaxy on the Strings
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 500% Mental DMG. After attacking, inflicts Moxie -2 on the target. If the target is in the [Confusion] status, this attack deals 100% more Mental DMG.

skills.name: Starlight Sonata
skills.desc_1_star: Mass attack. Deals 150% Mental DMG to 2 enemies.
skills.desc_2_star: Mass attack. Deals 150% Mental DMG to 2 enemies. After attacking, inflicts 1 stack of [Confusion] on the targets for 1 round.
skills.desc_3_star: Mass attack. Deals 200% Mental DMG to 2 enemies. After attacking, inflicts 2 stacks of [Confusion] on the targets for 1 round.

skills.name: Concerto in D-fense
skills.desc_1_star: Mass counter. Gives all allies 1 stack of [Interstellar Blessing] and [Sturdiness] statuses.
skills.desc_2_star: Mass counter. Gives all allies 1 stack of [Interstellar Blessing] and [Sturdiness] statuses. The caster gains 1 additional stack of [Interstellar Blessing].
skills.desc_3_star: Mass counter. Gives all allies 1 stack of [Interstellar Blessing] and [Sturdiness] statuses. The caster gains 2 additional stacks of [Interstellar Blessing].

insights.desc: After performing 3 actions, enters [Refrain].
DMG Dealt +8% when entering battle.
Enhanced [Refrain] effect: If there are enemies after the caster takes action, also inflicts 1 round of [Seal] on all enemies.

skills.name: Long Long Journey
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target debuff. Inflicts 1 stack of [Confusion] on the target for 1 round; then enters the [Mapping] status for the round, gains Eureka +2, converts all own incantations to [Rehabilitation] of their matching rank, and casts them all if able.

skills.name: Rehabilitation
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Gains Eureka +1 and deals 180% Mental DMG. Spend 2 Eureka to deal Mental DMG +60% and convert excess Critical Rate to Critical DMG for this attack.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Gains Eureka +1 and deals 270% Mental DMG. Spend 2 Eureka to deal Mental DMG +90% and convert excess Critical Rate to Critical DMG for this attack.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Gains Eureka +1 and deals 450% Mental DMG. Spend 2 Eureka to deal Mental DMG +150% and convert excess Critical Rate to Critical DMG for this attack.

skills.name: Practicability
skills.desc_1_star: Mass attack. Gains Eureka +1 and deals 110% Mental DMG to 2 enemies; gains 1 stack of [Preparation - Windsong].
skills.desc_2_star: Mass attack. Gains Eureka +1 and deals 165% Mental DMG to 2 enemies; gains 2 stacks of [Preparation - Windsong].
skills.desc_3_star: Mass attack. Gains Eureka +1 and deals 285% Mental DMG to 2 enemies; gains 3 stacks of [Preparation -Windsong].

insights.desc: Whenever an ally scores a critical hit with an incantation or an enemy gets a stack of [Confusion], grant 1 stack of [Measure] to self.
Critical Rate +10% when entering battle.

When entering battle, gain Critical Rate +10% and Critical DMG +10%.

After casting an Ultimate, gain 1 stack of [Preparation - Windsong].

skills.name: The Rapids Know All
skills.desc_1_star: Mass buff. Grants Shield with (the user's Max HP x25%) HP to all allies for 2 rounds. Grants [Immunity] to the targets for 1 round. Grants 2 additional stacks of [Flow] to self.

skills.name: Action Taker
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 200% Mental DMG.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Deals 200% Mental DMG. Inflicts DMG Dealt -20% for 2 rounds on the target hit.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Deals 350% Mental DMG. Inflicts DMG Dealt -25% for 2 rounds on the target hit.

skills.name: Words of Water
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target heal. Recovers (the user's Max HP x15%) HP to an ally and grants 1 stack of [Sturdiness] to the target. Then, recovers (the user's Max HP x10%) HP to the ally with the lowest HP percentage.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target heal. Recovers (the user's Max HP x25%) HP to an ally and grants 1 stack of [Sturdiness] to the target. Then, recovers (the user's Max HP x15%) HP to the ally with the lowest HP percentage and grants 1 stack of [Sturdiness] to the target.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target heal. Recovers (the user's Max HP x40%) HP to an ally and grants 1 stack of [Sturdiness] to the target. Then, recovers (the user's Max HP x25%) HP to the ally with the lowest HP percentage and grants 1 stack of [Sturdiness] to the target.

insights.desc: When casting a rank 2 or rank 3 Debuff-type basic incantation, consume 1 stack of [Flow] and grant Moxie +1 to self. When entering battle, instantly gain 2 stacks of [Flow].
When entering battle, Healing Done +10%.
When casting a Heal-type basic incantation, consume 1 stack of [Flow] and enter the [Empower Incantation I] status for 1 round (only effective if not already in [Empower Incantation I] status).

skills.name: Minimalism and Maximalism
skills.desc_1_star: Mass attack. Deals 250% Reality DMG to all enemies. Inflicts Moxie -2 on the targets hit.

skills.name: Anode and Cathode
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 200% Reality DMG.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Deals 250% Reality DMG and dispels all [Stats Up] and [Pos Status] statuses from the target.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Deals 450% Reality DMG and dispels all [Stats Up] and [Pos Status] statuses from the target.

skills.name: Coffee or Tea
skills.desc_1_star: 1-target attack. Deals 200% Reality DMG.
skills.desc_2_star: 1-target attack. Deals 250% Reality DMG and dispels all [Counter] from the target.
skills.desc_3_star: 1-target attack. Deals 450% Reality DMG and dispels all [Counter] from the target.

insights.desc: When the caster dispels [Stats Up] or [Pos Status] statuses from the enemy, inflicts [Silence] status on them for 1 round. When the caster dispels [Counter] status from the enemy, inflicts [Silence] status on them for 2 rounds.
DMG Dealt +8% when entering battle.
After casting the Ultimate, inflicts [Disconcert] status on the target(s) for 1 round.
